name: Seo Jiwoo

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Water Dragon Strike
basic.description: Jiwoo punches with her fist that's full of energy. Deals Water elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage.

core.name: Twin Dragon Strike
core.description: Jiwoo strikes powerfully with both fists charged with the Water Dragon's energy. Deals Water elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Inflicts Airborne effect on hit.

skill.name: Water Dragon Rush
skill.description: Jiwoo jumps towards the enemy with all her might and strikes down. [Heavy Attack: Water Dragon Rush]: Jiwoo strikes the ground with the Water Dragon. Deals Water elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Knocks Down target. Heavy Attack applies Shield to entire team (5% of user's HP, 25 seconds). Super Armor applied during use.

skill.name: Lightning Kick
skill.description: Jiwoo lifts her feet vertically and strikes down in front of her. [Heavy Attack: Lightning Kick]: Jiwoo punches upward with a surging Water Dragon. Deals Water elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Knocks Down target. Heavy Attack increases Break effectiveness by 50%. Super Armor applied during use.

support.name: Short Attack: Water Dragon Lightning Kick
support.description: The user jumps towards the enemy with all her might and strikes down. Deals Water elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. Knocks Down target. Applies Shield to entire team (10% of user's HP, 25 seconds).

qte.name: Burst Punch
qte.description: Jiwoo gathers all her energy into her fist and releases it while charging forward. Deals Water elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill. Inflicts Airborne effect on hit.

ultimate.name: Lethal Move: Water Dragon Transformation Strike
ultimate.description: Jiwoo gathers the Water Dragon's energy, jumps into the air, and slams down her fist with the power of the Water Dragon, devastating her surroundings. Deals Water elemental damage. Inflicts Airborne effect on hit.

passive.name: Water Dragon Training
passive.description: When Twin Dragon Strike, Water Dragon Rush, Lightning Kick, or Burst Punch is used, it applies [Training] 1 time. When 3 instances of [Training] have been applied, [Water Dragon Training] is applied. When [Water Dragon Training] is active, it resets the cooldowns of Water Dragon Rush and Lightning Kick and changes them to Heavy Attack: Water Dragon Rush and Heavy Attack: Lightning Kick. [Training] has Infinite duration (stacking up to 3 times). [Water Dragon Training] effects are removed when Heavy Attack: Water Dragon Rush or Heavy Attack: Lightning Kick is used. Duration: Infinite.

advancements: Increases the damage of Heavy Attack: Water Dragon Rush and Heavy Attack: Lightning Kick by 150%.
Increases the user's Break effectiveness by 15%. Increases the user's Break effectiveness when using Heavy Attack: Lightning Kick by 50%.
The user recovers 50 MP upon applying [Water Dragon Training].
Increases the user's Max HP equal to 15% of their additional Critical Hit damage.
The Critical Hit Rate and Skill Damage of Heavy Attack: Water Dragon Rush, Heavy Attack: Lightning Kick, and Lethal Move: Water Dragon Transformation Strike increases by 32%.
